manual_entries.title: Siemens Clean Heat Sink And Cooling Air Path
manual_entries.summary: Clean the heat sink and cooling air path regularly to prevent dust buildup and thermal derating.

zh.title: Siemens 清洁散热器和冷却风道
zh.summary: 应定期清洁散热器和冷却风道，避免灰尘积聚导致降额或过热。

steps: 检查散热器和冷却风道是否积尘
定期清洁散热器和冷却风道
Inspect the heat sink and cooling air path for dust buildup
Clean the heat sink and cooling air path regularly

chunk.cleaned_text: Clean the heat sink and cooling air path regularly to avoid dust buildup and overheating.
chunk.text_excerpt: clean the heat sink and cooling air path regularly

evidence.evidence_text: 定期清洁散热器和冷却风道，防止灰尘积聚引起过热。

manual_entries.title: Siemens Check Cooling Fan Operation And Airflow
manual_entries.summary: If thermal alarms persist, check cooling fan operation and confirm the air inlet and outlet remain unobstructed.

zh.title: Siemens 检查冷却风扇运行与风道通畅
zh.summary: 如果热报警持续出现，应检查冷却风扇运行状态，并确认进风口和出风口没有堵塞。

structured_payload.step: 检查冷却风扇运行状态，并确认进风口和出风口无遮挡。
Check cooling fan operation and confirm the air inlet and outlet are unobstructed

chunk.cleaned_text: Check cooling fan operation and keep the air inlet and outlet clear when thermal alarms occur.
chunk.text_excerpt: check cooling fan operation and keep the air inlet and outlet clear

evidence.evidence_text: 发生热报警时，检查冷却风扇运行，并保持进风口和出风口通畅。
